ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "rated" INTEGER /* Whether the game was rated or not */,
  "turns" INTEGER /* Number of turns in the game */,
  "victory_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Out of Time, Resign, Mate) */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the game (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "time_increment" TEXT /* Time increment used in the game (e.g., 15+2, 5+10) */,
  "white_id" INTEGER /* ID of the white player */,
  "white_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the white player */,
  "black_id" INTEGER /* ID of the black player */,
  "black_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the black player */,
  "moves" TEXT /* Moves made during the game in standard algebraic notation */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the game was played */,
  "game_source" TEXT /* Source of the game data (e.g., tournament, online platform, manual input) */,
  "opening_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opening used in the game */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opening variation used in the game */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opening response used in the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., rapid, blitz, classical) */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the game (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "game_server" TEXT /* Server or platform where the game was played */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game or platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES opening_variations ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_white_id FOREIGN KEY ("white_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opening_id FOREIGN KEY ("opening_id") REFERENCES openings ("opening_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_black_id FOREIGN KEY ("black_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., FIDE, USCF, internal) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Player's bio or description */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is active on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "openings" (
  "opening_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opening */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code used to identify the opening (e.g., D10, B00) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the opening (e.g., Slav Defense, Nimzowitsch Defense) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the opening */,
  "eco_code" TEXT /* ECO (Encyclopaedia of Chess Openings) code for the opening */,
  "mainline" TEXT /* Mainline moves of the opening */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the opening (e.g., percentage of games using it) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opening_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opening_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "opening_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opening the variation belongs to */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code used to identify the variation (e.g., Exchange Variation, Kennedy Variation) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variation */,
  "mainline" TEXT /* Mainline moves of the variation */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the variation (e.g., percentage of games using it) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opening_variations_opening_id FOREIGN KEY ("opening_id") REFERENCES openings ("opening_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the move belongs to */,
  "move_number" INTEGER /* Number of the move in the game */,
  "move_notation" TEXT /* Notation of the move (e.g., e4, Nf3) */,
  "move_description" TEXT /* Description of the move */,
  "move_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to make the move */,
  "move_type" TEXT /* Type of move (e.g., capture, check, checkmate) */,
  "move_evaluation" REAL /* Evaluation of the move (e.g., +0.5, -1.2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move the analysis belongs to */,
  "evaluation" REAL /* Evaluation of the move (e.g., 1.2, -0.5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine used for analysis */,
  "engine_version" TEXT /* Version of the engine used for analysis */,
  "analysis_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the analysis (e.g., 20 ply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_analysis_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the comment belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., praise, criticism, advice) */,
  "comment_source" TEXT /* Source of the comment (e.g., player, coach, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_count" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "win_count" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the player */,
  "loss_count" INTEGER /* Number of games lost by the player */,
  "draw_count" INTEGER /* Number of games drawn by the player */,
  "average_rating" INTEGER /* Average rating of the player */,
  "best_game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's best game */,
  "worst_game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's worst game */,
  "longest_game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's longest game */,
  "shortest_game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's shortest game */,
  "opening_statistics" TEXT /* JSON object containing statistics for different openings used by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
